name: Yamaki Co.,Ltd.
summary: Yamaki Co.,Ltd. engages in planning, manufacture, and sale of men's and women's shirts primarily in Japan. The company operates under the Shirt of the shirt, SHIRTY'S, CHOYA shirt, STYLE WORKS, Shirt station, SHIRT HOUSE, and Men's Closet brand names. It also operates shops. The company was founded in 1953 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
